category_sources: source_facts.description says kind runs a local Kubernetes cluster in Docker.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kind; source_facts.homepage and repo use the official lowercase project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official kind site; /docs is its official documentation section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies local Kubernetes clusters running in Docker.
